title: Textual Frequency Paired Dataset (TFPD)
wikilinks: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
Adam’s Law: Textual Frequency Law on Large Language Models
summary: The Textual Frequency Paired Dataset (TFPD) is a curated benchmark introduced in this paper to evaluate the impact of sentence-level frequency on LLM performance. It consists of pairs of paraphrases—one high-frequency, one low-frequency—...
